# tg_node_connectors (Data Source)

Lists all connectors configured on a node. Useful for discovering existing connector IDs to feed into `import {}` blocks during V1ŌåÆV2 migration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "tg_node_connectors" "edge1" {
  node_id = "d70e7d73-2a1c-4388-bbb1-08ca2fd39f48"
}

output "node_connector_ids" {
  value = [for c in data.tg_node_connectors.edge1.connectors : c.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `node_id` (String) Node UID.

### Read-Only

- `connectors` (List of Object) List of connectors on the node. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connectors))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--connectors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connectors`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String)
- `nic` (String)
- `node` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)
- `rate_limit` (Number)
- `service` (String)
